definitions.text: Expression and exchange of individual ideas through talking with other people; also, a set instance or occasion of such talking. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: I had an interesting conversation with Nicolas yesterday about how much he's getting paid.
You need to improve conversation in foreign languages.

definitions.text: Dialogue or interaction regarding a topic.
The back-and-forth play of the blades in a bout.
